observe: Some of you matter more right now. Lower number, higher priority — the Core listens to rank here.
fault: Someone's been waiting since this started. Every new high-priority arrival keeps cutting in front of them. That's starvation, and it's not an accident.
repair: Run it by priority. Watch who never gets called.
escape: Watch the low-priority ones — don't let the Core forget them entirely.

observe: Priority scheduling runs the highest-priority process first.
fault: A low-priority process is experiencing starvation.
repair: Run the schedule ordered by priority value.
escape: Complete the scheduling run before time expires.

hints: Lower priority number always wins — check who never reaches the top of that order.
